---
title: "Mrs Stewart"
---

## Mrs Stewart

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1861-2)

### Biography

This is probably the novelist Mrs Louisa Stewart, and the Louisa Stewart who contributed to <i>MP</i> is no doubt her, and not the young Mary Louisa (Stewart) Molesworth.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
